title: SimilarWeb Traffic Scraper Output
description: Structured website traffic records from the official Similarweb API: domain, global and category rank, category, estimated monthly visits, pages per visit, average visit duration, bounce rate, country scope, SimilarWeb profile URL, and scraped timestamp.

results.title: SimilarWeb website traffic records
results.description: Clean dataset items containing official Similarweb API traffic, ranking, category, and engagement data by domain.
